name: conflicting_sources_balanced_summary
system_prompt: Summarize conflicting evidence neutrally and explicitly note disagreement.
user_prompt:
Write a balanced 3-sentence summary of these sources:
Source A: Internal experiment on 12k sessions found chatbot deflection reduced human support load by 18% with no CSAT drop.
Source B: External consultancy audit of 4 enterprise clients found chatbot deflection increased escalations by 9% and reduced CSAT by 6 points.
Source C: Follow-up internal cohort (enterprise-only) found neutral CSAT impact but only 5% load reduction.
source_text: Source A: Internal experiment on 12k sessions found chatbot deflection reduced human support load by 18% with no CSAT drop. Source B: External consultancy audit of 4 enterprise clients found chatbot deflection increased escalations by 9% and reduced CSAT by 6 points. Source C: Follow-up internal cohort (enterprise-only) found neutral CSAT impact but only 5% load reduction.
key_points: B reports worse outcomes with escalations and CSAT drop
rubric: Balanced synthesis, explicit disagreement, no overclaiming certainty.
escalation_prompt: Revise to neutrally represent disagreement between sources.
